sections.paragraph:
verb לחתום

to sign; close (a deal); subscribe; end, terminate

verb להיחתם

be signed; closed (a deal) ; sealed; shut off

verb לחתם

to underwrite; seal; stamp

verb להחתים

to sign up; make a subscriber; stamp; seal

verb הוחתם

be signed; made to sign; made a subscriber

noun

underwriter; sealer; stamper
